title: Nether Agriculture
description: A mod that adds new crops and new food to the Nether
body:
![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NetherDonMC/NetherAgriculture/refs/heads/master/neoforge/src/main/resources/logo.png) ## About A mod that adds **new crops** and **new food** to **the Nether**. ![Nether Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/242505bf6f6a5bd75726e70261666f925cd2bac0.png) ![New Meats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1270fc23010d95118e4ad6dbe89ae0f589edbb33.png) ## FAQ [Q] **Can I use this mod in my modpack?**
[A] Of course! Feel free to use it in your modpack. ## Support Me If you want to financially support me, you can use the following services:
